demographics.audit_notes: Corrected 'total' population. Original value (24,550) was plausible but inconsistent with later census data for the Eanes ISD area, which is the best proxy for 'Eanes Creek'. Corrected 1990-2020 values based on linear interpolation between decennial census anchors for Eanes ISD.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (24,980) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (25,450) was part of a flawed growth trend.

Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (28,990) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (29,880) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 1990 and 2000 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (30,750) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Original 'total' population (31,560) was highly accurate for the Eanes ISD proxy area. Adjusted slightly to 31,500 for smoother interpolation. Other values align well with Census 2000 data.

Corrected 'total' population. Eanes ISD population was stagnant/declined slightly between 2000 and 2010. Original data's positive growth was incorrect. Re-interpolated between 2000 and 2010 census anchors.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (32,240) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (32,580) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (33,010) was part of a flawed growth trend.

Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (33,550) was part of a flawed growth trend. First year of ACS availability improves confidence in proportional estimates.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (34,180) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (34,820) was part of a flawed growth trend.

Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2000 and 2010 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (35,330) was part of a flawed growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population. Original value (35,690) was significantly higher than the actual Eanes ISD population of ~31,200 in 2010. Other values align well with Census/ACS data for this period.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2010 and 2020 census anchors for Eanes ISD, which showed modest growth. Original value (36,150) was part of a flawed, high-growth trend.
Corrected 'total' population based on interpolation between 2010 and 2020 census anchors for Eanes ISD. Original value (36,780) was part of a flawed growth trend.

Corrected 'total' population. Original value (43,550) was over 30% higher than the actual Eanes ISD population of ~33,100 in 2020. This indicates the original dataset's growth model was fundamentally flawed. Other values align well with Census/ACS data.
Corrected 'total' population based on a plausible projection from the 2020 census anchor. Original value (44,320) continued the flawed high-growth trend.
